reviews.comment:
Meses y meses sin gastronomía, ni un kiosco. Poco personal en playa.

(Translated by Google)
Months and months without food, not even a kiosk. Very few staff on the beach.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaOFl5R2VBEAE

reviews.comment:
fui para hacerme la lisencia internacional y todos fueron muy amables. el trámoite se hace relativamente rapido. Si esta bajo construcción entonces te mandan a estacionar en un lugar medio embarrado.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my international driving license and everyone was very friendly. The process is relatively quick. If it's under construction, they'll tell you to park in a somewhat muddy spot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNacHV6TU9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Hay servicio integral para el automotor. También encontramos el ACA a los asociados les devuelve 5 x ciento.

(Translated by Google)
There's comprehensive automotive service. We also found the ACA gives members 5 percent back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaNnVlNTFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre muy bien atendido y sobresaliente su encargado Gustavo Rhor.
Para recomendar

(Translated by Google)
Always excellent service, and the manager, Gustavo Rhor, is outstanding. Highly recommended.

(Translated by Google) I happened to find out to become an ACA partner, and because of Mariela’s so kind attention and predisposition, I associated and acquired insurance for my vehicle

reviews.comment:
La peor estacion ACA del pais, o no tienen nafta, o no les anda la app, o no suman los puntos. SIEMPRE TIENEN PROBLEMAS Y MUY MALA ATENCION

(Translated by Google)
The worst ACA station in the country. Either they don't have gas, or the app doesn't work, or they don't earn points. They always have problems and offer very poor service.
